title: Modeler API Dependency List
description: A merged set of plugin dependency rules for a given model owner. Dependencies define predecessor constraints: a plugin matching a dependency key can only be used as a successor of one of its listed predecessor plugins. Glob-style wildcards are supported in both plugin ID keys and predecessor ID values.

^(start|subprocess|swimlane|element|link.description: Dependency rules for a component type. Each key is a plugin ID pattern (glob-style wildcards supported).

additionalProperties.description: A list of predecessor definitions. The plugin matching the key can only be used as a successor of one of these predecessors.

type.description: The component type name of the predecessor plugin.

id.description: The plugin ID pattern of the predecessor. Glob-style wildcards (*) are supported.
